role: P1-13 D5-parity diagnostics — the ground-truth official RiNALMo-giga checkpoints used to (a) prove the multimolecule/rinalmo-giga mirror encoder is bit-identical to official (Test 1) and (b) confirm the released per-family SS-fine-tuned checkpoints reproduce the published ArchiveII LOFO F1 through our pipeline (Test 2, subset).

source.authors: Penić RJ, Vlašić T, Huber RG, Wan Y, Šikić M
source.paper: Penić et al., RiNALMo: general-purpose RNA language models can generalize well on structure prediction tasks, Nature Communications 2025
source.format: raw PyTorch state_dict (.pt); native lbcb-sci/RiNALMo naming

files.name: rinalmo_giga_pretrained.pt
files.role: official pretrained giga backbone (mirrored by multimolecule/rinalmo-giga)

files.name: rinalmo_giga_ss_archiveII-tRNA_ft.pt
files.role: official tRNA-held-out LOFO SS-fine-tuned checkpoint (encoder + trained SS head)

not_committed: The .pt weight files themselves are NOT stored in the repo (globally .gitignored *.pt; re-fetchable from the pinned Zenodo URLs by the recorded md5). The record additionally holds the 6 other rinalmo_giga_ss_archiveII-*_ft.pt families (16s, grp1, RNaseP, srp, tmRNA, telomerase) + rinalmo_giga_ss_bprna_ft.pt + non-SS heads, not downloaded (subset diagnostics).
note: CLAUDE.md §10.2/§10.3: sourced public, checksummed, provenance-complete — not fabricated. Corresponds to the HF mirror multimolecule/rinalmo-giga @2a71f6f98fb41dd2e6542a5e131d3778111d1468 (fp32).
